response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as 須多水見 (Sutamizumi) from on-screen text during her birthday festival. 2. Identified the song title 'うみゃうにゃはっぴーらいふ' from on-screen text. 3. Identified the composer as ナトダニユー(SUPA LOVE) from screen text at 03:43. 4. Searched for song lyrics, found that they are likely original, and transcribed the lyrics displayed on the screen during the performance. 5. Divided the video into scenes based on music performance vs. talk breaks.
response.global_summary: A video featuring the VTuber 須多水見 (Sutamizumi) performing her original song 'うみゃうにゃはっぴーらいふ' (Umyau-nya Happy Life) during her 2026 Birthday Festival. The video includes two full performance segments separated by a talk segment.
